title: HPSLSA Driver-cum-Office Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 11 Posts
org: Himachal Pradesh State Legal Services Authority (HPSLSA)
shortInfo: The Himachal Pradesh State Legal Services Authority (HPSLSA) has officially announced the Driver-cum-Office Assistant Recruitment 2026 with 11 openings. The detailed notification was published under Advt No. 112/LSA/Estt.Part-XVI/2025/ on the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 18 to 45 years and hold a Graduate qualification can now submit their online applications up to 13 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

basic_details.job_title: HPSLSA Driver-cum-Office Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 11 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Himachal Pradesh State Legal Services Authority (HPSLSA)
basic_details.short_information: The Himachal Pradesh State Legal Services Authority (HPSLSA) has officially announced the Driver-cum-Office Assistant Recruitment 2026 with 11 openings. The detailed notification was published under Advt No. 112/LSA/Estt.Part-XVI/2025/ on the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 18 to 45 years and hold a Graduate qualification can now submit their online applications up to 13 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 45 years

qualification.details: Graduate from a recognized University Valid Driving Licence for Light Motor Vehicles (LMV) Minimum driving experience of three (3) years

selection_process: Screening test Proficiency (driving) test Verification of documents
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the HPSLSA Driver-cum-Office Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HPSLSA to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HPSLSA Driver-cum-Office Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the HPSLSA Driver-cum-Office Assistant recruitment is 13th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Driver-cum-Office Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be a Graduate from a recognized University to be eligible for the Driver-cum-Office Assistant position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The age limit for applicants is between 18 years and 45 years. Specific age relaxations may apply for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Driver-cum-Office Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 11 vacancies announced for the Driver-cum-Office Assistant position by HPSLSA.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Driver-cum-Office Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Driver-cum-Office Assistant post will receive a salary of ₹20,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the HPSLSA recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹450/- for Unreserved candidates and ₹300/- for Reserved Categories of Himachal Pradesh.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications will be accepted ONLY IN ONLINE MODE through the official website of HPSLSA.

faq.question: Q8. What are the required documents for the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format during the online application process.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Driver-cum-Office Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a screening test, a proficiency (driving) test, and verification of documents.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any driving experience required for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must possess a minimum driving experience of three (3) years along with a valid LMV driving license.
